steps.title: Compare disturbance types
steps.content: Laurent and Fournier found no carbon-mercury correlation in wastewater-impacted waters. Bergstrom found a similar correlation to undisturbed waters in waters disturbed by urban development, so one human disturbance cannot represent all disturbances.

steps.title: Reject unsupported claims
steps.content: Choice A compares concentration levels, which the passage does not give. Choice B invents a methods difference between the studies. Choice D compares how many freshwater bodies each disturbance affects, which is not discussed. The answer is C.
